excluded_files_or_classes: raw paper figure or table images
local absolute paths and user-specific home paths

hygiene_checks.name: export_file_inventory
hygiene_checks.summary: 26 files total; required skill files, npm/npx package entrypoint, release hygiene review data, and 10 example cards present.

hygiene_checks.name: forbidden_binary_and_queue_classes
hygiene_checks.summary: No PDFs, rendered page images, raw image files, or original queue state files found.

hygiene_checks.name: mechanical_card_qa_markdown_only
hygiene_checks.command: for each examples/cards/*.md: uv run skill/scripts/qa_check.py <card>
hygiene_checks.summary: All 10 example cards passed Markdown structural checks. WARN is expected because source PDFs are intentionally absent, so PDF-backed page and figure/table inventory checks were skipped.

hygiene_checks.name: literal_hygiene_scan
hygiene_checks.command: rg scans for local path markers, credential labels, and requested sensitive terms inside the export folder
hygiene_checks.summary: No local path or credential-label matches. Benign matches remain in research text: a retrieval-generation model variant name and one benchmark dataset name in example cards.

hygiene_checks.name: privacy_release_check
hygiene_checks.summary: Decision WARN; 24 files scanned; 0 block findings; OPF missing. Warning lines are paper identifiers, dates, equation/table values, and page-number examples matching broad heuristics. Local report was written outside the repository.

hygiene_checks.name: reviewed_privacy_warning_gate
hygiene_checks.summary: 22 privacy preflight findings matched reviewed line-hash entries in privacy-reviewed-findings.json; 0 unresolved warnings or blocks.

residual_risks: Example cards are review samples and need human paper-by-paper publication review.
Mechanical checks cannot prove copyright suitability or factual correctness.
PDF-backed QA was not run because source PDFs are intentionally excluded.
OPF was unavailable in the local environment, so model-based PII scanning was not run unless a reviewer installs OPF and reruns the gate.
Reviewed-warning PASS depends on exact line hashes; changed example-card lines must be reviewed again.
